kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\raquel.goncalves\\portal_laudos\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\e3a90e6c-4b3e-471b-be32-f32ea8d10f9b"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://hml.portal-laudos.grupoelfa.com.br/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//button[contains(.,'Adicionar Laudo')] at state visible

kw.msg: Fills the text 'OCREVUS' in the given field.

kw.name: Get Attribute
kw.msg: Attribute is: 'MuiButtonBase-root MuiButton-root MuiLoadingButton-root MuiButton-contained MuiButton-containedPrimary MuiButton-sizeMedium MuiButton-containedSizeMedium MuiButton-root MuiLoadingButton-root MuiButton-contained MuiButton-containedPrimary MuiButton-sizeMedium MuiButton-containedSizeMedium css-1fitwok'

${classe} = MuiButtonBase-root MuiButton-root MuiLoadingButton-root MuiButton-contained MuiButton-containedPrimary MuiButton-sizeMedium MuiButton-containedSizeMedium MuiButton-root MuiLoadingButton-root MuiButton...
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//button[contains(.,'Salvar')] at state enabled
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
